name: resource-curator
tagline: Curates and audits external learning resources (articles, videos, courses, MDN refs) for JavaScript concept documentation pages.
verdict: Thorough, safe content-curation guide with clear quality criteria, trusted-source lists, description formulas, and a link-audit workflow. Weak spots: no stated out-of-scope cases, a stray count inconsistency (1-3 vs 0-3 courses), everything crammed into one 620-line file with no reference split, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Description states what it does (find/evaluate/maintain resources, audit links) but never says when to invoke it.
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope guidance anywhere in the skill.
Course target given as '1-3 (optional)' (line 41) but the audit report template lists target '0-3' (line 455).
